experiences.title: Senior Software Engineer
description: Architected a data archival system unblocking sales for 10+ enterprise customers and ensuring data sovereignty compliance across 30+ organizations.
Shipped a specialized Survey PII processing engine that secured 5 high-value enterprise contracts.
Developed a scalable feature-flag and plan-control system enabling granular tier-based access and self-serve monetization.
Championed technical excellence via design reviews and mentored junior engineers, reducing onboarding time by 30% and standardizing code quality.
Collaborated with Product Managers to translate complex requirements into technical roadmaps for onboarding & growth use cases.

experiences.title: Software Engineer 2
description: Re-architected capacity management to Slot-level granularity in 7 days, reducing expansion lead time from 4 weeks to 1 week for a major marketing launch.
Delivered Real-time Demand Shaping v2, reducing peak-traffic order failures by ~1% (absolute) and recovering ~$1k+ GMV per day.
Led backend engineering for the InsanelyGood pivot, designing high-availability presentation-layer services to support the transition.
Orchestrated end-to-end integration of delivery tracking systems during a high-stakes migration into the primary Swiggy ecosystem.

experiences.title: Associate (SE 2) & Analyst (SE 1)
description: Re-engineered Trade Allocation workflows to scale processing capacity 10x while reducing infrastructure costs by 80%.
Deployed Kong API Gateway for the Advisor Portal, centralizing security and traffic management.
Optimized high-throughput Kafka processors to handle real-time trade data streams via the FIX Protocol.

experiences.title: Spring & Summer Intern
description: Built a Trade Position Open-Close calculator, mitigating human errors that caused $1k+ in projected monthly losses.
Developed an Automated Regression Tester for Derivatives Exchange Connectivity, reducing release testing cycles from 8 hours to 2 hours.
